raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a set of mugs on the platform XXXX. The mugs arrived with defects and I requested the vendor to allow me to return the mugs for a refund. The vendor never answered back and enabled me to return the merchandise. 

Opened a dispute with Amex, which informed me that the vendor had provided info stating that they give me the option to return ( which was not true ). Amex sided with the vendor. When I tried to reopen dispute with Amex, Amex told me that the dispute was too old and because of that, they couldn't reconsider it again.
